speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate between waters and waters

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let the waters under the heavens be gathered to one place, and let the dry land appear

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let the earth sprout vegetation, herbs yielding seed, fruit trees bearing fruit after their kind, whose seed is in them, on the earth

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let there be lights in the expanse of the heavens to separate between the day and between the night, and let them be for signs and for seasons and for days and years

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: and let them be for lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the face of the expanse of the heavens

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let the earth bring forth living creatures after their kind, cattle and creeping things and beasts of the earth after their kind

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Let us make man in our image, after our likeness, and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over the cattle and over all the earth and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it, and have dominion over the fish of the sea and over the birds of the heavens and over every living thing that moves on the earth

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Behold, I have given you every plant yielding seed that is on the face of all the earth, and every tree with seed in its fruit — you shall have them for food

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: And to every beast of the earth and to every bird of the heavens and to everything that creeps on the earth, everything that has the breath of life — every green plant for food
